ChatConfigEditor.description: Configure the AI chat scenario that will be shared with the client.

basic.title: Basic information
basic.description: General settings of the scenario and its visibility.

ai.title: AI behavior
ai.description: Describe the role, goal and rules the neural model should follow.

flow.title: Conversation flow
flow.description: Define when the conversation should end and how the assistant should finish it.

summary.title: Summary generation
summary.description: Explain what kind of post-conversation summary and analysis should be generated for the admin.

title.label: Title
title.placeholder: For example: Qualification chat for consultation

topic.label: Topic
topic.placeholder: Describe the main topic of the conversation

assistantRole.label: Assistant role
assistantRole.placeholder: Describe who the assistant is and how it should behave

goal.label: Goal
goal.placeholder: Describe the result the assistant should achieve in this conversation

rules.label: Rules
rules.placeholder: List restrictions and important behavioral rules

endConditions.label: End conditions
endConditions.placeholder: Describe when the assistant should finish the conversation

farewellMessage.label: Farewell message
farewellMessage.placeholder: Write the final message that should be sent before the chat is completed

summaryInstructions.label: Summary instructions
summaryInstructions.placeholder: Explain what summary, result and client analysis should be generated

ChatConfigsGrid.title: Ваші конфігурації чатів
ChatConfigsGrid.description: Створюйте та та налаштовуйте схеми спілкування з клієнтами

Empty.title: No chat configs yet
Empty.description: Create your first configuration to generate a client link and start collecting conversations.
